final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 character expression grid illustration inspired by the 仙剑奇侠传 character 赵灵儿 IP.

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation Pixar-style aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 3×3 grid layout (3 rows × 3 columns, 9 panels total), each panel showing the character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include all 9 panels with 赵灵儿-inspired young woman character (long flowing light-colored hair, delicate fairy-like features, traditional Chinese fantasy aesthetic), each panel a distinct expression + action + outfit:
  Top-left: winking / adjusting glasses / green sweater
  Top-center: smirking / lowering dark sunglasses / red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking / finger on chin / yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile / arms resting on edge / black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling / thumbs up / orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral / drinking boba tea / blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy / waving / purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed / arms crossed / pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly / poking cheeks / teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: each panel framed by a torn hole in white paper, character bust visible through the opening
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, playful, lively atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, varied direction matching each outfit color per panel — exact palette ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a clean 3D rendered surface treatment with soft shading — exact texture detail is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all 9 panels in correct grid positions; each panel must show a distinctly different expression and action; character must remain consistent across all panels as 赵灵儿-inspired
Avoid: mixing up panel positions; inconsistent character appearance across panels
